title: OrganiGram Holdings (OGI) Q2 2020 Earnings Call Transcript
text: OrganiGram Holdings Q2 2020 Earnings Call Summary. Call Date: April 14, 2020. Period Covered: Q2 Fiscal 2020 (ended February 29, 2020). Key Financial Metrics: Net Revenue: $23.2 million (down from $26.9 million YoY; up 8% sequentially from Q1's $25.2 million). Cash Position: $41 million in cash and short-term investments. Adjusted EBITDA: Negative $1.1 million in Q2. Net Loss: $6.8 million ($0.041 per diluted share). Gross Margin (before fair value): 32% of net revenue. Revenue Breakdown (Q2 2020): Adult-use recreation: $15 million (65%). Medical sales: $2.4 million (10%). Wholesale: $5.6 million (24%). International: $0.2 million (1%). Operational Highlights - Product Portfolio Diversification: Rec 1.0 products: 52% of net revenue. Rec 2.0 products (vapes, chocolates): 13% of net revenue. Launched Edison vape pens and Edison Bytes chocolate truffles. Introduced new strains: Limelight (20-25% THC) and El Dorado (18-20% THC). Cost Structure: Cash cost of cultivation: $0.53 per gram. All-in cultivation cost: $0.75 per gram (down from Q1). Average net selling price maintained above $5 per gram. COVID-19 Response: The company implemented temporary voluntary layoffs affecting facility staff, with approximately $0.6 million in one-time charges. Capital & Liquidity: Remaining capex on Phase 5: $11 million. Remaining capex on Phase 4: $2 million. Available undrawn term loan: $30 million. Available revolver: $25 million.
